query: ok so we've merged the last few PRs for the 2.4 milestone and QA signed off yesterday. Can you bump the version and update the changelog so I can cut the release this afternoon?
I need to ship v3.0.0 of this PowerShell module — there are breaking changes in the exported functions. Can you prepare the release with the changelog and manifest update?
the commit messages since the last tag are a mess but the code is solid. Can you figure out what changed and prep a new version?
This is our first real release of the module. We've been on 0.0.1 since we started. Time to go 1.0 — update everything we need for a proper release.
I just merged a hotfix for the auth bypass. Can you bump the patch version, update CHANGELOG.md, and open a PR so we can get this out today?
we need to cut a release for the npm package. version is currently 4.1.2 in package.json. There have been 3 commits since then — two features and a bugfix. Do the changelog and version bump.
Hey can you update the changelog and pyproject.toml version? We're releasing 1.8.0 of the data pipeline today and I want the changelog to follow Keep a Changelog format.
prepare a release for this rust crate. Check Cargo.toml for the current version and git log for what changed since last time.
the package.json has version 1.2.3.4 which isn't standard semver. I want to normalize it and ship a proper release with a changelog entry.
Can you help me write a GitHub Actions workflow that automatically creates a release when I push a tag? I want it to generate release notes from the commits.
I'm setting up semantic-release for this repo. Can you configure .releaserc.json with the right plugins for npm publishing and changelog generation?
Can you look at CHANGELOG.md and tell me what was in the 2.3.0 release? I need to know if the retry logic was included.
I need to roll back to version 1.4.2. Can you check out that tag and help me figure out what broke in 1.5.0?
Can you add a pre-commit hook that validates conventional commit message format? We keep getting commits like 'fixed stuff' and 'updated thing'.
I want to refactor the version field in our package.json to follow a CalVer scheme like 2026.04.01 instead of semver. Can you update the build scripts?
Help me write a script that parses CHANGELOG.md and extracts the latest version's release notes to post in our Slack channel.
Can you set up dependabot.yml to automatically bump our dependency versions weekly? I want it for both npm and GitHub Actions.
We use lerna for our monorepo. Can you help me configure independent versioning so each package gets its own changelog and version bumps?
I need to create a git tag for the current version and push it to origin. The version in package.json is 3.2.1.
